paymentconfirmationtemplate:
THANKS FOR YOUR CONTRIBUTION
Thanks you all for your support and volunteerism for the 2010-2011 school year! Your help has really made a difference!

SUMMARY OF YOUR CONTRIBUTION
[%PAYMENTDETAILS%]

ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
As you know, it's that time again...we are embarking on a new school year! In the coming weeks, we will be out with the old and in with the new and we have already kicked off our new 2011-2012 F.O.R. Membership Drive. Each year we start fresh, so please, If you have not signed up already, please find our table at Back To School Night on August 31st, to rejoin Friends of the High School.

Membership remains at $20 per year and we'll have your 2011-2012 F.O.R. Calendar all ready for you. Not only did your donated fund$ from last year go towards our new Parent and Student Surveys, but this year, we're super excited to have donation$ go towards our new 2012 F.O.R. Scholarship!

We'll put smiles on the faces of many (Faculty and Administrators) first thing in the morning with a little Welcome Back Continental Breakfast! We want them energized and ready to meet the needs of our students as they start off the new term. Again, we thank you all for making this possible!

Thank You All...and we look forward to your continued support.

Warmest Regards,
